summary: Completed testing of PlayXBets Winner UI upgrade with P2P betting. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified - match page shows minimal Winner UI with dark theme, two team cards with single odds, P2P bet form with quick stake buttons, My Bets section, and Betting Pool section. No session markets, back/lay columns, or tied match visible.
seed_data_creation: P2P bets created during testing: KKR ₹500, SRH ₹100
context_for_next_testing_agent: Winner UI upgrade fully tested. Key findings: (1) Match page has dark theme bg-[#0D1117]. (2) Winner section shows two team cards with single odds value each (no back/lay columns). (3) Team card click opens bet form with stake input and quick stake buttons (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 10K). (4) P2P bet API (POST /api/p2p/bet) works correctly - deducts from wallet, creates bet, runs FIFO matching. (5) My Bets section shows bet status (pending/partially_matched/fully_matched). (6) Betting Pool section shows per-team totals. (7) Market status endpoint (GET /api/match/{id}/market-status) returns suspend state. (8) Odds polling works (1s interval). (9) No session markets, tied match, or extra betting widgets visible. (10) Test match: KKR vs SRH (ID: 13bfc2f98f9fa3d124be6ce6535ddc8f).

team_cards_with_odds.details: Two team cards showing single odds value each (KKR: 2.22, SRH: 1.81)

no_back_lay_columns.details: No back/lay columns visible - minimal Winner UI

no_session_markets.details: No session markets visible on match page

bet_form_on_team_click.details: Clicking team card opens bet form with stake input

quick_stake_buttons.details: 5/5 quick stake buttons found (100, 500, 1K, 5K, 10K) - clicking updates input

p2p_bet_api.details: POST /api/p2p/bet places bet, deducts from wallet, returns status

p2p_my_bets_api.details: GET /api/p2p/bets/{match_id}/my returns user's bets with status

my_bets_section.details: My Bets section shows bet status (pending/partially_matched/fully_matched)

betting_pool_section.details: Betting Pool section shows per-team totals (KKR: ₹500, SRH: ₹100)

odds_polling.details: Odds displayed correctly and polled every 1 second

wallet_integration.details: Balance displayed after login, deducted after bet placement

mocked_apis.note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints use real data (Odds API for odds, CricketData for live scores)

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/match_page_after_login.png - Match page after login showing balance and My Bets
.screenshots/bet_form_with_stake.png - Bet form with quick stake buttons

p2p_betting_verification.fifo_matching: WORKING - Opposing bets matched in FIFO order
p2p_betting_verification.partial_matching: WORKING - Bets can be partially matched
